mnemonics.title: REINFORCE Steps
mnemonics.content: Rally Every Agent: Reward * Gradient * Normalize * Overcome variance * Record trajectories * Clip gradients * Entropy bonus

mnemonics.title: PG Components
mnemonics.content: Policy Parameters → Generate Actions → Receive Rewards → Compute Gradients → Update Weights (PG PAW)

acronyms.usage: Ensures stable updates via KL divergence constraint
Uses clipped surrogate objective for efficient training

visualTips.visualization: Imagine climbing a reward hill while carrying policy parameters in a backpack
Picture balancing a noisy scale with baseline weights

analogies.analogy: Like adjusting a thermostat based on room feedback - small tweaks guided by temperature (reward) changes
Chef (actor) creates dishes while food critic (critic) provides immediate feedback
